meta.purpose: Examples that show judgment structure rather than scripts.
meta.load_condition: Load when examples, transformation patterns, or before/after critique are needed.

cases.brief: A page has many tiles floating randomly.
cases.bad_pattern: All items animate at once with equal visual weight.
cases.master_pattern: Create one anchor, stagger clusters by semantic group, reduce speed variance, and use stillness to make the core idea readable.
